info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: naByennaBnAti naBate hiMsAyAM tattuBeH samam ' (Slo. 145 ) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pra naBasva pfTivi BindDIdaM divyaM naBaH' (aTarva॰6.18.1) pradIryasva utpAwitA BavetyarTaH -naBatirakarRako'pi- 'naBantAmanyake same' (f॰8.39.1) ityatra yaTA mA BUvannanyake sarva iti hi tatra niruktam
